case_title: FORET GENE P. VS VANGUARD SECURITY SERVICES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FORET GENE P. AS TO DEFENDANT VANGUARD SECURITY SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
